content: Md Imbesat Hassan Rizvi is a Research Associate at the Robert Bosch Centre for Cyber-Physical Systems (RBCCPS), Indian Institute of Science (IISc). His research interests include reinforcement learning, robotics and grounded language learning. He is currently working on providing natural language based instructions to robots.
